---
title: "sqliteAppendLog()"
description: "Create an append-log tier over an optional Node SQLite backend."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create an append-log tier over an optional Node SQLite backend.

## Import

```ts
import { sqliteAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/node";
```

## Signature

```ts
function sqliteAppendLog(
	path: string,
	opts: SqliteAppendLogOptions<T> = {},
): AppendLogStorageTier<T> & { close(): void }
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `path` | `string` | path value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `SqliteAppendLogOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `AppendLogStorageTier<T> & { close(): void }` value.

## Example

```ts
import { sqliteAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/node";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/node.ts`
